title: Simple Music Discs
description: Simple Music Discs is a lightweight mod created with MCreator that adds unused Tracks from Minecraft OST (and more) as 25 unique music discs including "Tears" Music Disc from 1.21.6, plus 2 secret, craftable ones.
body:
Simple Music Discs is a lightweight mod created with MCreator that adds 30 unique music discs including "Tears" Music Disc from 1.21.6 (i made it fire resistance so it wont burn in lava) and "Lava Chicken" from 1.21.7, plus 2 secret craftable ones.

Discord: https://discord.gg/8eTZx3tS2U

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@xeon124


[!IMPORTANT!]

- i need feedback, please tell me if something appears too often or is unbalanced, also you can give me ideas how to make the discs obtainable because there are structures in this mod that contains the music discs, but they are all just a placeholder.

- Due to this mod being only available on NeoForge 1.21.1 i allow for porting the mod on other Mod Clients like Forge or Fabric and on other Minecraft versions like 1.20.1 or any in fact as long as you Credit me, please do not port or reupload my mod without Crediting me.

🎵 Music Discs Included:

C418 – Équinoxe
(Exclusive to Volume Alpha)

C418 – Excuse
(Exclusive to Volume Alpha)

C418 – Kyoto
(Exclusive to Volume Beta)

C418 – Dog
(Exclusive to Volume Alpha, also plays at the end of "Cat" in Legacy Edition)

Notch – Magnetic Circuit (Calm4)
(Unused track originally known as "Calm4")

C418 – Eleven
(Exclusive to Volume Beta; designed to trick players into thinking it's disc "11")

Shauny Jang – Earth
(From Minecraft Earth)

Shauny Jang – Sprouting
(From Minecraft Earth)

TheGabodiaz – Retired
(From FNF: Vs Steve, themed around Notch)

Amos Roddy – Tears
(Appears in Minecraft 1.21.6+)

C418 – Door
(Exclusive to Volume Alpha)

C418 - Death
(Exclusive to Volume Alpha)

C418 – Flake
(Exclusive to Volume Beta)

C418 & Protostar - Aria Math (Protostar Remix)
(Exclusive to Volume Beta)

C418 - Ki
(Exclusive to Volume Beta)

C418 - Battle (Battlemode 1)
(Exclusive to Legacy Edition Minigame: Battle)

Gareth Coker - Tumble (Time is of the Essence)
(Exclusive to Legacy Edition Minigame: Tumble)

Gareth Coker - Glide
(Exclusive to Legacy Edition Minigame: Glide)

Jukio Kallio - Infinite Spooky Amethyst
(Exclusive to The Garden Awakens Album)

Niccolo Pacella - Ghastly Diary
(Originates from Minecraft Live: March 2025 Soundtrack)

Lena Raine & JustXeon_ & PyroBen - Eld Unknown (JustXeon_ Remix)
(My first Own Music Disc in this mod)


JustXeon_ - Piano Madness
(Some Random Song i made on a sample app back somewhere in between of 2019-2021)

indawgnito - Skybase
(a Minecraft Parody Of: Somewhere Only We Know - Keane)

indawgnito - I Placed A Bed
(a Minecraft Parody Of: I Kissed A Girl - Katy Perry) [COPYRIGHT WARNING!]

indawgnito - Diamond Memories
(Original Minecraft Song with Lyrics)

Theo5970 - The End (null)
(Original song made by my friend Theo)

JustXeon_ - The Night Walk
(Original song made by me)

JustXeon_ - The Night Walk (Piano)
(Same as The Night Walk but only with Piano)

Tone Deaf Rebellion - And Action!
(Appears in Minecraft 25w14craftmine)

Hyper Potions - Lava Chicken
(Appears in Minecraft 1.21.6+)

🕵️‍♂️ Secret Music Discs (Crafting Only):

null – song.ogg
*(From The Broken Script mod – a slowed-down version of "Oh Christmas Tree")

Crafting: 4 Gunpowder + 4 Black Wool (in the corners)

J0kers Card – Error
*(From FNF: Vs Steve: Bedrock Edition, based on the Error422 creepypasta)

Crafting: 4 Gunpowder + 1 Lime, Cyan, Blue, and Pink Wool (one of each, also in the corners)

JustXeon_ – The Night Walk (OLD)
*(Old Version of The Night Walk Music Disc)


If crafting is unclear, it's recommended to use JEI for recipe assistance.

🏠 Structures with Music Disc Loot:




There Used To Be Some Vanilla+ Structures that Contained The Music Discs but they were just a placeholder and are now Deleted, they can still be summoned with /Place command Tho

🎯 Other Ways to Obtain Discs:



C418 - Dog, C418 - Eleven, Notch - Magnetic Circuit, Jukio Kallio - Infinite Spooky Amethyst, JustXeon_ - Piano Madness, indawgnito - Skybase, indawgnito - I Placed A Bed, indawgnito - Diamond Memories, JustXeon_ - The Night Walk and JustXeon_ - The Night Walk (Piano):
- All can be dropped if a Skeleton shoots and kills a Creeper
Amos Roddy - Tears and Niccolo Pacella - Ghastly Diary:
- Can be dropped when a Ghast dies from its own fire ball
C418 - Door:
- Has a 100% chance to appear in the Start/Bonus Chest
C418 - Death:
- Has around 20 or 25% chance to drop when a Player Dies (CURRENTLY DISABLED, IT'S NOW CRAFTABLE)
C418 - Kyoto, C418 - Flake, C418 & Protostar - Aria Math (Protostar Remix) and C418 - Ki:
- All can found in an Nether Fortress Chest and can be dropped if a Skeleton shoots and kills a Blaze
C418 - Équinoxe, C418 - Excuse, Shauny Jang - Earth and Shauny Jang - Sprouting:
- All can found in an Plains Village House Chest

C418 - Battle, Gareth Coker - Tumble, Gareth Coker - Glide and Theo5970 - The End:
- All can found in an End City Chest
Lena Raine & JustXeon_ & PyroBen - Eld Unknown (JustXeon_ Remix):
- All can found in an Ominous Vault in an Trial Chamber
C418 - Dog, C418 - Eleven, Notch - Magnetic Circuit and TheGabodiaz – Retired:
- They can also be found in an Mob Spawner (aka The Dungeon)
Hyper Potions - Lava Chicken:- Can be dropped when killed a Chicken Jockey
